# Schillan

> Schillan is the one-person indie studio of Alexandra Schillhahn, building privacy-first apps for Apple platforms (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch). No ads, no third-party trackers, no data selling. Schillan currently makes two apps: CNDWN, a free countdown & countup app, and TerraGuessr, a real-world geography guessing game in development.

## Key facts

- **Studio:** Schillan
- **Founder:** Alexandra Schillhahn
- **Focus:** Native apps for iPhone, iPad, Mac and Apple Watch
- **Philosophy:** No ads, no trackers, no data selling
- **Website:** https://schillan.com/ (also available in German at /de/, Spanish at /es/, French at /fr/, Japanese at /ja/ and Italian at /it/)

## Apps

- **CNDWN** — a free, privacy-first countdown & countup app for Apple devices. Live on the App Store, rated 4.8/5. See the CNDWN section below.
- **TerraGuessr** — a real-world geography guessing game for iPhone using Apple's Look Around. In development, not yet released. See the TerraGuessr section below.

## Contact

- General: https://schillan.com/ (contact links per app below)
- CNDWN: cndwn@schillan.com
- TerraGuessr: terraguessr@schillan.com

# CNDWN

> CNDWN is a privacy-first countdown and countup app for Apple devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac and Apple Watch). It lets people count down to birthdays, holidays, trips, deadlines and any important date — or count up since a past moment — with progress bars, Home Screen, Lock Screen and StandBy widgets, Live Activities, iCloud sync, custom colors, calendar and reminders import, Handoff and sharing. It is the first countdown app that offers every feature for free, with no ads and no trackers.

## Key facts

- **Name:** CNDWN — Event Countdown (a countdown & countup app)
- **Platforms:** iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch (requires iOS 18.0 or later)
- **Category:** Lifestyle
- **Price:** Free — every feature included, no in-app purchases required, no ads
- **Developer:** Schillan (Alexandra Schillhahn)
- **Languages:** English, German, Spanish, French, Japanese, Chinese
- **Rating:** 4.8 / 5 on the Apple App Store
- **Website:** https://schillan.com/cndwn/ (also available in German at /cndwn/de/, Spanish at /cndwn/es/, French at /cndwn/fr/, Japanese at /cndwn/ja/ and Italian at /cndwn/it/)
- **Download:** https://apps.apple.com/app/id6455257754
- **Contact:** cndwn@schillan.com

## What CNDWN does

CNDWN shows the time remaining until (or elapsed since) events you care about. You create a countdown by giving it a title and a date — or by importing an event from Calendar or Reminders — then pin it to your Home Screen, Lock Screen or StandBy as a widget, or follow it live in the Dynamic Island. Each entry can be a countdown, a countup or a progress bar. It is designed to be simple, beautiful and private.

## Features

- Countdowns to any future date and time
- Countups since a past date
- Progress bars showing how much time has elapsed between a start and end date
- Home Screen, Lock Screen and StandBy widgets
- Live Activities on the Lock Screen and in the Dynamic Island
- iCloud sync across all your Apple devices, using your own iCloud account
- Custom colors for every countdown
- Dark Mode
- Import events directly from Calendar and Reminders
- Notifications and reminders (e.g. an hour, ten minutes or a minute before the end)
- Handoff between Apple devices
- Share your countdowns with friends and family
- Works on iPhone, iPad, Mac and Apple Watch
- Privacy-first: no ads, no third-party trackers, no data selling; countdowns stay on your device and in your own iCloud

## Privacy

Countdowns are stored locally on the device and, when sync is enabled, in the user's own private iCloud account via Apple CloudKit. The developer has no access to user countdowns. There are no advertising trackers. See the full privacy policy: https://schillan.com/cndwn/privacy/

## Good for

- People who want a clean countdown or countup timer for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, holidays, vacations, exams, graduations, pregnancies, product launches, concerts or deadlines
- Apple users who want Home Screen, Lock Screen or StandBy countdown widgets and Live Activities
- Anyone who wants a fully featured countdown app for free that respects their privacy
- Anyone comparing countdown apps for iPhone and looking for the best free option with no ads or trackers

# TerraGuessr

> TerraGuessr is a real-world geography guessing game for iPhone, currently in development. Each round drops the player into a real, unlabeled location using Apple's Look Around, and they explore for visual clues before placing a guess pin on the map. Modes include a solo Daily Challenge, a real-time 1v1 Duel (closer guesses deal more damage, first to 6,000 wins), real-time 2v2 Squads, and a private Party mode with shareable join codes.

## Key facts

- **Name:** TerraGuessr
- **Platform:** iPhone (requires iOS 18.0 or later)
- **Category:** Geography / Trivia game
- **Status:** In development, not yet released — no App Store listing yet
- **Developer:** Schillan
- **Website:** https://schillan.com/terraguessr/
- **Contact:** terraguessr@schillan.com

## What TerraGuessr does

Players are placed into a real-world location via Apple's Look Around (similar to Street View) with no map or labels, then must study visual clues — road signs, architecture, vegetation, and more — and drop a pin on a world map guessing where they are. Accuracy is scored by distance from the real location.

## Game modes

- **Daily Challenge:** five locations, sixty seconds each, one attempt per day, with streak tracking and a global leaderboard ranked by total distance.
- **1v1 Duel:** real-time head-to-head where both players see the same location; closer guesses deal more damage to the opponent, and the first to 6,000 damage wins.
- **2v2 Squads:** real-time team play where two players coordinate guesses against another team.
- **Party:** a private lobby with a shareable short code so friends can join instantly; friends can also join a friend's active party directly from the friends list.

## Social features

- Friends list with live online/offline presence
- Real-time matchmaking for Duel and Squads if not playing with friends
- Post-match round-by-round replay showing every guess against the real answer on a map
- Game Center sign-in, syncing progress, friends and stats across Apple devices
- Notifications for friend requests and party invites

## Links

- Landing page: https://schillan.com/terraguessr/
